summary: Comprehensive testing of Central Inventory API contract stabilization. All 11 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend login page loads correctly. All 10 fixes verified working via real POS API proxy.
critical_code_review_comments: source_selector format: POS API requires {mode: 'segment_id', segment_id: X} object, not string 'fifo'. Frontend SourceSelector component correctly returns this format.

test_credentials.note: Login credentials (hisoka@phantom.com / 123456) returning 401 from POS API as noted in review request

seed_data_creation: None - using real POS API via proxy
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 API contract fixes verified working. Backend proxy at /api/proxy/v2/{path} forwards to preprod.mygenie.online. Cached token from MongoDB used for authenticated tests. Frontend login page renders correctly but actual login flow cannot be tested without valid POS credentials.

features_tested.1_api_root_health: PASS - GET /api/ returns 200 with 'Central Inventory API Proxy' message
features_tested.2_hierarchy_summary_franchise: PASS - POST with store_type=franchise returns 200 with stores array (4 franchise stores)
features_tested.3_hierarchy_summary_central: PASS - POST with store_type=central returns 200 with stores array
features_tested.4_source_options: PASS - POST with source_inventory_master_id + from_restaurant_id returns 200 with segments
features_tested.9_transfer_details: PASS - GET /api/proxy/v2/inventory-transfer/details/51 returns transfer data with lines
features_tested.10_frontend_login_page: PASS - Login page loads at /login with email, password inputs and Sign In button

api_contract_fixes_verified.fix_1_hierarchy_summary_store_type: VERIFIED - store_type is mandatory and working
api_contract_fixes_verified.fix_7_resolution_meta_json_parsing: VERIFIED - resolution_meta is JSON string from POS
api_contract_fixes_verified.fix_10_wastage_field_mapping: VERIFIED - field names correct in response
